visualization_settings.text:
### Member Renewal Category Comparison
Rows are category rows. `Total` counts members in that row in the previous season. `Not Renewed` counts those previous-year members who did not renew. `New` counts members with no previous-year package, attributed to their current category row. The remaining columns count where previous-year members renewed into the current-year category named by the column. Click any count to see the member rows.

stages.native:
WITH settings AS (
  SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
  FROM public.global_settings
  WHERE key = 'n8n_base_url'
), member_rows AS (
  SELECT
    rm.id AS raw_member_id,
    (SELECT n8n_base_url FROM settings) AS n8n_base_url,
    '⚙️' AS "Add Items",
    concat(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name") AS "Name",
    rm."First name",
    rm."Last name",
    rm."Membership",
    CASE
      WHEN lower(trim(coalesce(rm."Share Contact Detail", ''))) IN ('yes', 'y', 'true', 't', '1') THEN '🟢 Yes'
      ELSE '🔴 No'
    END AS "Consent",
    rm."Email address",
    rm."Phone number",
    rm."Mobile number"
  FROM public.raw_members rm
  LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages
    ON rm."Membership" = membership_packages.name
  WHERE COALESCE(membership_packages.category, '') <> 'Pavilion Key'
    AND COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true
  [[AND membership_packages.season = {{year}}]]
  [[AND {{category}}]]
  [[AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM regexp_split_to_table({{search}}, E'[\n\r,;]+') AS term(search_term)
    WHERE btrim(search_term) <> ''
      AND concat(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name") ILIKE '%' || btrim(search_term) || '%'
  )]]
)
SELECT
  raw_member_id,
  n8n_base_url,
  "Add Items",
  "Name",
  "First name",
  "Last name",
  "Membership",
  "Consent",
  "Email address",
  "Phone number",
  "Mobile number"
FROM member_rows
ORDER BY "Last name", "First name", "Membership";
SELECT '+ Create Refund' AS action;

WITH target AS (
  SELECT
    format('%s/%s', (({{year}})::int - 1), {{year}}::int) AS season_key,
    (({{year}})::int - 1)::text AS source_season
), display_order AS (
  SELECT category, min(display_order) AS display_order
  FROM public.membership_packages, target
  WHERE season = target.source_season
    AND category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  GROUP BY category
)
SELECT
  h.membership AS category,
  COALESCE(d.display_order, 999) AS display_order,
  CASE target.season_key
    WHEN '2026/2027' THEN h."2026/2027"
    WHEN '2025/2026' THEN h."2025/2026"
    WHEN '2024/2025' THEN h."2024/2025"
    WHEN '2023/2024' THEN h."2023/2024"
    WHEN '2022/2023' THEN h."2022/2023"
    WHEN '2021/2022' THEN h."2021/2022"
    WHEN '2020/2021' THEN h."2020/2021"
    WHEN '2019/2020' THEN h."2019/2020"
    WHEN '2018/2019' THEN h."2018/2019"
    WHEN '2017/2018' THEN h."2017/2018"
    WHEN '2016/2017' THEN h."2016/2017"
    WHEN '2015/2016' THEN h."2015/2016"
    WHEN '2014/2015' THEN h."2014/2015"
  END AS Count
FROM public.membership_history h
CROSS JOIN target
LEFT JOIN display_order d ON d.category = h.membership
WHERE h.membership NOT IN ('Total', 'Pavilion Key')
  AND CASE target.season_key
    WHEN '2026/2027' THEN h."2026/2027"
    WHEN '2025/2026' THEN h."2025/2026"
    WHEN '2024/2025' THEN h."2024/2025"
    WHEN '2023/2024' THEN h."2023/2024"
    WHEN '2022/2023' THEN h."2022/2023"
    WHEN '2021/2022' THEN h."2021/2022"
    WHEN '2020/2021' THEN h."2020/2021"
    WHEN '2019/2020' THEN h."2019/2020"
    WHEN '2018/2019' THEN h."2018/2019"
    WHEN '2017/2018' THEN h."2017/2018"
    WHEN '2016/2017' THEN h."2016/2017"
    WHEN '2015/2016' THEN h."2015/2016"
    WHEN '2014/2015' THEN h."2014/2015"
  END IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY COALESCE(d.display_order, 999), h.membership;

visualization_settings.text:
# Signup Report

This page shows information about the about the Selected Year signups.

stages.native:
WITH settings AS (
  SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
  FROM public.global_settings
  WHERE key = 'n8n_base_url'
)
SELECT
  (SELECT n8n_base_url FROM settings) AS n8n_base_url,
  e.id AS execution_id,
  w.id AS workflow_id,
  w.name AS workflow_name,
  e.status,
  e.mode,
  e."startedAt" AS started_at,
  e."stoppedAt" AS stopped_at,
  round(extract(epoch from (coalesce(e."stoppedAt", now()) - e."startedAt"))::numeric, 1) AS duration_seconds
FROM n8n.execution_entity e
LEFT JOIN n8n.workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
ORDER BY e."startedAt" DESC
LIMIT 100;

WITH key_people AS (
  SELECT lower(trim(m."First name")) AS first_key,
         lower(trim(m."Last name")) AS last_key,
         bool_or(m."Status" = 'Active' AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid','Part Paid')) AS holds_key,
         bool_or(m."Status" <> 'Active' OR m."Payment" = 'Not Paid') AS unresolved
  FROM raw_members m
  JOIN membership_packages p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  WHERE p.category = 'Pavilion Key'
    AND coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
  GROUP BY 1,2
), stock AS (
  SELECT
    coalesce(max(CASE WHEN key = 'keys_stock_opening' THEN value END), '42')::bigint AS opening_stock,
    coalesce(max(CASE WHEN key = 'keys_stock_baseline_completed_batch_id' THEN value END), '0')::bigint AS baseline_batch_id
  FROM public.global_settings
), issued AS (
  SELECT coalesce(sum(s.key_tags), 0)::bigint AS issued_keys
  FROM public.signup_batches b
  LEFT JOIN public.vw_signup_batches_summary s ON s.batch_id = b.id
  CROSS JOIN stock
  WHERE b.status = $$Complete$$
    AND b.id > stock.baseline_batch_id
), summary AS (
  SELECT 1 AS ord,
         'How many people currently hold keys?' AS question,
         count(*) FILTER (WHERE holds_key)::bigint AS count,
         'http://metabase/question/1620'::text AS detail_url
  FROM key_people
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 2 AS ord,
         'How many key-related cases are we dealing with?' AS question,
         count(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT holds_key AND unresolved)::bigint AS count,
         'http://metabase/question/1621'::text AS detail_url
  FROM key_people
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3 AS ord,
         'Issued since stock baseline 30/3/2026' AS question,
         issued_keys AS count,
         'http://metabase/question/1622'::text AS detail_url
  FROM issued
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 4 AS ord,
         'Keys in stock' AS question,
         (SELECT opening_stock FROM stock) - issued_keys AS count,
         'http://metabase/question/1622'::text AS detail_url
  FROM issued
)
SELECT question AS "Question",
       count AS "Count",
       detail_url
FROM summary
ORDER BY ord;

WITH target AS (
  SELECT format('%s/%s', (({{year}})::int - 1), {{year}}::int) AS season_key
)
SELECT CASE target.season_key
  WHEN '2026/2027' THEN h."2026/2027"
  WHEN '2025/2026' THEN h."2025/2026"
  WHEN '2024/2025' THEN h."2024/2025"
  WHEN '2023/2024' THEN h."2023/2024"
  WHEN '2022/2023' THEN h."2022/2023"
  WHEN '2021/2022' THEN h."2021/2022"
  WHEN '2020/2021' THEN h."2020/2021"
  WHEN '2019/2020' THEN h."2019/2020"
  WHEN '2018/2019' THEN h."2018/2019"
  WHEN '2017/2018' THEN h."2017/2018"
  WHEN '2016/2017' THEN h."2016/2017"
  WHEN '2015/2016' THEN h."2015/2016"
  WHEN '2014/2015' THEN h."2014/2015"
END AS count
FROM public.membership_history h
CROSS JOIN target
WHERE h.membership = 'Total';

visualization_settings.text:
# Membership Report

This page summarizes information about the Selected Year memberships.

card.name: n8n Executions by Workflow and Status

stages.native:
WITH settings AS (
  SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
  FROM public.global_settings
  WHERE key = 'n8n_base_url'
)
SELECT
  (SELECT n8n_base_url FROM settings) AS n8n_base_url,
  w.id AS workflow_id,
  w.name AS workflow_name,
  e.status,
  count(*) AS execution_count,
  max(e."startedAt") AS latest_execution_at
FROM n8n.execution_entity e
LEFT JOIN n8n.workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
GROUP BY (SELECT n8n_base_url FROM settings), w.id, w.name, e.status
ORDER BY w.name, e.status;

SELECT
  m."First name",
  m."Last name",
  m."Gender",
  m."Age",
  m."Email address",
  m."Phone number",
  m."Mobile number",
  m."Address 1",
  m."Address 2",
  m."Address 3",
  m."Town",
  m."County",
  m."Country",
  m."Postcode",
  p.category,
  u.id,
  u.postcode AS postcode_2,
  u.latitude,
  u.longitude
FROM public.raw_members m
LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
LEFT JOIN public.ukpostcodes u
  ON upper(
       substring(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '') from 1 for greatest(length(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '')) - 3, 0))
       || case when length(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '')) > 3 then ' ' else '' end
       || right(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', ''), 3)
     ) = upper(
       substring(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '') from 1 for greatest(length(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '')) - 3, 0))
       || case when length(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '')) > 3 then ' ' else '' end
       || right(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', ''), 3)
     )
WHERE m."Status" = 'Active'
  AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.season = {{year}}
ORDER BY m."Last name", m."First name"

SELECT
  signup_date AS "Signup Date",
  payer AS "Payer",
  member AS "Member",
  product AS "Product",
  cost AS "Cost",
  quantity AS "Quantity",
  method AS "Method",
  status AS "Status",
  id AS "ID",
  clubspark_status AS "ClubSpark Status",
  batch_id AS "Batch ID"
FROM member_signups
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM signup_date) = ({{year}})::int
ORDER BY signup_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  count(*) AS count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" = 'Active';

with latest as (
  select max(season::int) as latest_season
  from public.membership_packages
), source_rows as (
  select
    case
      when m."Age" is null then null
      when m."Age" >= 90 then '90-99'
      else lpad((floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10)::text, 2, '0') || '-' || lpad((floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10 + 9)::text, 2, '0')
    end as age_range,
    case
      when m."Age" is null then null
      when m."Age" >= 90 then 90
      else (floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10)::int
    end as age_sort,
    p.season
  from public.raw_members m
  join public.membership_packages p
    on m."Membership" = p.name
  join latest l
    on p.season in ((l.latest_season - 1)::text, l.latest_season::text)
  where p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
    and p.category is not null
    and m."Payment" in ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    and m."Age" is not null
    and (
      (p.season = (select latest_season::text from latest) and coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true)
      or
      (p.season = (select (latest_season - 1)::text from latest) and coalesce(m.is_current, false) = false)
    )
), counts as (
  select age_range, age_sort, season, count(*)::int as count
  from source_rows
  group by age_range, age_sort, season
)
select
  age_range as "Age Range",
  coalesce(max(case when season = ((select latest_season from latest) - 1)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Previous Year",
  coalesce(max(case when season = (select latest_season from latest)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Current Year"
from counts
group by age_range, age_sort
order by age_sort;

SELECT p.category AS category, count(*) AS count FROM public.raw_members AS m JOIN public.membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name WHERE p.season = {{year}} AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key' AND m."Status" = 'Active' AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid') AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true GROUP BY p.category, p.display_order ORDER BY p.display_order;

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int AS signup_hour, count(*) AS count
FROM public.member_signups
WHERE signup_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY signup_hour
ORDER BY signup_hour

SELECT signup_day, count(*) AS count
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int
      WHEN 1 THEN 'Monday'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'Tuesday'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'Wednesday'
      WHEN 4 THEN 'Thursday'
      WHEN 5 THEN 'Friday'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'Saturday'
      WHEN 7 THEN 'Sunday'
    END AS signup_day,
    EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int AS sort_order
  FROM public.member_signups
  WHERE signup_date IS NOT NULL
) t
GROUP BY signup_day, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

card.name: List of New Members - Selected Year

stages.native:
WITH settings AS (
  SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
  FROM public.global_settings
  WHERE key = 'n8n_base_url'
), season_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_identity_key)
    member_identity_key,
    src.raw_member_id,
    (SELECT n8n_base_url FROM settings) AS n8n_base_url,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS "Name",
    src."Membership",
    src."Email address"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(m."Email address", ''))), '') IS NOT NULL THEN
          lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) || '|' || lower(trim(m."Email address"))
        ELSE lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      END AS member_identity_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = ({{year}})::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY member_identity_key, src.raw_member_id DESC, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), prev_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_identity_key)
    member_identity_key
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(m."Email address", ''))), '') IS NOT NULL THEN
          lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) || '|' || lower(trim(m."Email address"))
        ELSE lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      END AS member_identity_key,
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY member_identity_key, src.raw_member_id DESC, src.display_order, src."Membership"
)
SELECT
  c.raw_member_id,
  c.n8n_base_url,
  c."Name",
  c."Membership",
  c."Email address"
FROM season_members c
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM prev_members p WHERE p.member_identity_key = c.member_identity_key
)
ORDER BY c."Name";

card.name: Count of Members Missing Signup Email

stages.native:
WITH current_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Membership",
    src.signup_match_group,
    COALESCE(
      to_date(NULLIF(src."Date joined venue", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
      to_date(NULLIF(src."Start Date", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY')
    ) AS effective_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*,
      p.category,
      p.display_order,
      COALESCE(msg.signup_match_group, lower(trim(p.name))) AS signup_match_group
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    LEFT JOIN public.membership_signup_match_groups msg
      ON msg.season = p.season
     AND msg.package_name = p.name
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
      AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), signups AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    lower(trim(s.member)) AS member_name,
    COALESCE(msg.signup_match_group, lower(trim(s.product))) AS signup_match_group
  FROM public.member_signups s
  LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages p
    ON s.product = p.name
  LEFT JOIN public.membership_signup_match_groups msg
    ON msg.season = COALESCE(p.season, {{year}})
   AND msg.package_name = s.product
  WHERE s.product LIKE '%' || {{year}} || '%'
), missing AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM current_members c
  LEFT JOIN signups s
    ON lower(trim(c.full_name)) = s.member_name
   AND c.signup_match_group = s.signup_match_group
  WHERE s.member_name IS NULL
    AND c.effective_date IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      c.effective_date > current_date
      OR c.effective_date::timestamp <= now() - interval '1 hour'
    )
)
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM missing;

card.description: Latest weak name-only reconcile matches for review.
card.name: Weak Name-Only Raw Matches

stages.native: WITH latest AS ( SELECT max(run_at) AS run_at FROM public.raw_reconcile_match_audit ) SELECT a.raw_table, a.source_name, a.source_membership, a.matched_id, a.outcome FROM public.raw_reconcile_match_audit a JOIN latest l ON a.run_at = l.run_at WHERE a.outcome = 'matched_by_name_only' ORDER BY a.raw_table, a.source_name, a.source_membership NULLS FIRST;

card.description: Latest ambiguous reconcile rows for raw_members and raw_contacts.
card.name: Ambiguous Raw Matches

stages.native: WITH latest AS ( SELECT max(run_at) AS run_at FROM public.raw_reconcile_match_audit ) SELECT a.raw_table, a.source_name, a.source_membership, a.outcome, a.candidate_count, a.candidate_ids, a.notes FROM public.raw_reconcile_match_audit a JOIN latest l ON a.run_at = l.run_at WHERE a.outcome IN ('ambiguous_same_name','ambiguous_multiple_candidates') ORDER BY a.raw_table, a.source_name, a.source_membership NULLS FIRST;

card.description: Full latest reconcile audit rows for raw_members and raw_contacts.
card.name: Latest Raw Match Audit

stages.native: WITH latest AS ( SELECT max(run_at) AS run_at FROM public.raw_reconcile_match_audit ) SELECT a.raw_table, a.source_name, a.source_membership, a.matched_id, a.match_rule, a.outcome, a.candidate_count, a.candidate_ids, a.notes FROM public.raw_reconcile_match_audit a JOIN latest l ON a.run_at = l.run_at ORDER BY a.raw_table, a.source_name, a.source_membership NULLS FIRST;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT max(season::int) AS latest_season
  FROM public.membership_packages
), current_display AS (
  SELECT trim(category) AS category, min(display_order) AS display_order
  FROM public.membership_packages p
  CROSS JOIN latest l
  WHERE p.season = l.latest_season::text
    AND trim(category) <> 'Pavilion Key'
    AND trim(category) <> ''
    AND category IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY trim(category)
), previous_display AS (
  SELECT trim(category) AS category, min(display_order) AS display_order
  FROM public.membership_packages p
  CROSS JOIN latest l
  WHERE p.season = (l.latest_season - 1)::text
    AND trim(category) <> 'Pavilion Key'
    AND trim(category) <> ''
    AND category IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY trim(category)
), current_counts AS (
  SELECT trim(p.category) AS category, count(*)::int AS current_year
  FROM public.raw_members m
  JOIN public.membership_packages p
    ON m."Membership" = p.name
  JOIN latest l
    ON p.season = l.latest_season::text
  WHERE trim(p.category) <> 'Pavilion Key'
    AND trim(p.category) <> ''
    AND p.category IS NOT NULL
    AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    AND coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
  GROUP BY trim(p.category)
), previous_counts AS (
  SELECT
    h.membership AS category,
    CASE format('%s/%s', l.latest_season - 1, l.latest_season)
      WHEN '2026/2027' THEN h."2026/2027"
      WHEN '2025/2026' THEN h."2025/2026"
      WHEN '2024/2025' THEN h."2024/2025"
      WHEN '2023/2024' THEN h."2023/2024"
      WHEN '2022/2023' THEN h."2022/2023"
      WHEN '2021/2022' THEN h."2021/2022"
      WHEN '2020/2021' THEN h."2020/2021"
      WHEN '2019/2020' THEN h."2019/2020"
      WHEN '2018/2019' THEN h."2018/2019"
      WHEN '2017/2018' THEN h."2017/2018"
      WHEN '2016/2017' THEN h."2016/2017"
      WHEN '2015/2016' THEN h."2015/2016"
      WHEN '2014/2015' THEN h."2014/2015"
    END::int AS previous_year
  FROM public.membership_history h
  CROSS JOIN latest l
  WHERE h.membership NOT IN ('Total', 'Pavilion Key')
), categories AS (
  SELECT category FROM current_counts
  UNION
  SELECT category FROM previous_counts
)
SELECT
  c.category,
  coalesce(prev.previous_year, 0)::int AS "Previous Year",
  coalesce(cur.current_year, 0)::int AS "Current Year"
FROM categories c
LEFT JOIN current_counts cur ON cur.category = c.category
LEFT JOIN previous_counts prev ON prev.category = c.category
LEFT JOIN current_display cd ON cd.category = c.category
LEFT JOIN previous_display pd ON pd.category = c.category
ORDER BY coalesce(cd.display_order, pd.display_order, 999), c.category;

visualization_settings.card.title: Membership categories compared to last year

card.description: Renewal comparison matrix. Rows are category rows in display order. Total Previous Year counts members in that row last year; Not Renewed counts those who did not renew; New counts new joiners attributed to their current category row. Click a count to see the matching members.
card.name: Member Renewal Category Comparison

stages.native:
WITH category_orders AS (
  SELECT category, MIN(display_order) AS display_order
  FROM public.membership_packages
  WHERE season IN ((({{year}})::int - 1)::text, ({{year}})::text)
    AND category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
  GROUP BY category
), prev_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_identity_key)
    member_identity_key,
    src.previous_category
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(m."Email address", ''))), '') IS NOT NULL THEN
          lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) || '|' || lower(trim(m."Email address"))
        ELSE lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      END AS member_identity_key,
      p.category AS previous_category,
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      m."Membership"
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY member_identity_key, src.raw_member_id DESC, src.previous_category, src."Membership"
), curr_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_identity_key)
    member_identity_key,
    src.current_category
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(m."Email address", ''))), '') IS NOT NULL THEN
          lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) || '|' || lower(trim(m."Email address"))
        ELSE lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      END AS member_identity_key,
      p.category AS current_category,
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      m."Membership"
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = ({{year}})::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY member_identity_key, src.raw_member_id DESC, src.current_category, src."Membership"
), member_matrix AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN p.member_identity_key IS NULL AND c.member_identity_key IS NOT NULL THEN c.current_category
      ELSE p.previous_category
    END AS row_category,
    CASE
      WHEN p.member_identity_key IS NULL AND c.member_identity_key IS NOT NULL THEN 'New'
      WHEN c.member_identity_key IS NULL THEN 'Not Renewed'
      ELSE c.current_category
    END AS transition_category,
    CASE
      WHEN p.previous_category IS NOT NULL THEN true
      ELSE false
    END AS is_previous_year_member
  FROM prev_members p
  FULL OUTER JOIN curr_members c
    ON c.member_identity_key = p.member_identity_key
)
SELECT
  ({{year}})::text AS filter_year,
  m.row_category AS "Category",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.is_previous_year_member)::int AS "Total",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Not Renewed')::int AS "Not Renewed",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'New')::int AS "New",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Senior')::int AS "Senior",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Off Peak')::int AS "Off Peak",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Young Adult')::int AS "Young Adult",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Junior')::int AS "Junior",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Mini (U10)')::int AS "Mini",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Parent')::int AS "Parent",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Family')::int AS "Family",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE m.transition_category = 'Senior Junior')::int AS "Sr Jr"
FROM member_matrix m
LEFT JOIN category_orders co
  ON co.category = m.row_category
GROUP BY filter_year, m.row_category, co.display_order
ORDER BY COALESCE(co.display_order, 999), m.row_category;

card.name: Count of Non-Active Members - Previous Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*) AS count,
  ({{year}})::text AS year
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
  AND COALESCE(m.is_current, false) = false
;

SELECT
  count(*) AS count,
  ({{year}})::text AS year
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
  AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
;

card.name: Count of New Members - Current Year

stages.native:
WITH season_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_identity_key)
    member_identity_key
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(m."Email address", ''))), '') IS NOT NULL THEN
          lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) || '|' || lower(trim(m."Email address"))
        ELSE lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      END AS member_identity_key,
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = ({{year}})::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY member_identity_key, src.raw_member_id DESC, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), prev_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_identity_key)
    member_identity_key
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(m."Email address", ''))), '') IS NOT NULL THEN
          lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) || '|' || lower(trim(m."Email address"))
        ELSE lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      END AS member_identity_key,
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY member_identity_key, src.raw_member_id DESC, src.display_order, src."Membership"
)
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM season_members c
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM prev_members p WHERE p.member_identity_key = c.member_identity_key
);

card.name: List of Members Not Renewed - Current Year

stages.native:
WITH settings AS (
  SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
  FROM public.global_settings
  WHERE key = 'n8n_base_url'
), current_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    src.raw_member_id,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Membership"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), current_pending_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    src.raw_member_id,
    src."Email address"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND COALESCE(m."Payment", '') NOT IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), previous_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    src.raw_member_id,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Membership",
    src."Email address"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      m.id AS raw_member_id,
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(cp.raw_member_id, p.raw_member_id) AS raw_member_id,
  (SELECT n8n_base_url FROM settings) AS n8n_base_url,
  p.full_name AS "Name",
  p."Membership",
  COALESCE(cp."Email address", p."Email address") AS "Email address",
  CASE WHEN cp.person_key IS NOT NULL THEN 'Pending' ELSE NULL END AS "Pending"
FROM previous_members p
LEFT JOIN current_pending_members cp
  ON cp.person_key = p.person_key
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM current_members c WHERE c.person_key = p.person_key
)
ORDER BY p.full_name;

card.name: Count of Members Not Renewed - Current Year

stages.native:
WITH current_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number",
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Postcode",
    src."Start Date",
    src."Expiry Date"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), previous_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number",
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Postcode",
    src."Start Date",
    src."Expiry Date"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
)
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM previous_members p
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM current_members c WHERE c.person_key = p.person_key
);

WITH settings AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END), 'http://n8n:5678') AS n8n_base_url
  FROM public.global_settings
)
SELECT
  '⚙️' AS "Actions",
  settings.n8n_base_url,
  b.id AS batch_id,
  b.status,
  b.created_at,
  b.completed_at,
  b.no_address_email_sent,
  COALESCE(s.signup_rows, 0) AS signup_row_count,
  COALESCE(s.manual_rows, 0) AS manual_row_count,
  COALESCE(s.signup_rows, 0) + COALESCE(s.manual_rows, 0) AS member_row_count,
  COALESCE(s.regular_tags, 0) AS regular_tags,
  COALESCE(s.parent_tags, 0) AS parent_tags,
  COALESCE(s.key_tags, 0) AS keys,
  COALESCE(s.total_items, 0) AS total_items
FROM public.signup_batches AS b
LEFT JOIN public.vw_signup_batches_summary AS s
  ON s.batch_id = b.id
CROSS JOIN settings
ORDER BY b.id DESC;

card.name: List of Members Missing Signup Email

stages.native:
WITH current_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    src.id AS raw_member_id,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number",
    src.signup_match_group,
    COALESCE(
      to_date(NULLIF(src."Date joined venue", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
      to_date(NULLIF(src."Start Date", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY')
    ) AS effective_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*,
      p.category,
      p.display_order,
      COALESCE(msg.signup_match_group, lower(trim(p.name))) AS signup_match_group
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    LEFT JOIN public.membership_signup_match_groups msg
      ON msg.season = p.season
     AND msg.package_name = p.name
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
      AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), signups AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    lower(trim(s.member)) AS member_name,
    COALESCE(msg.signup_match_group, lower(trim(s.product))) AS signup_match_group
  FROM public.member_signups s
  LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages p
    ON s.product = p.name
  LEFT JOIN public.membership_signup_match_groups msg
    ON msg.season = COALESCE(p.season, {{year}})
   AND msg.package_name = s.product
  WHERE s.product LIKE '%' || {{year}} || '%'
), missing AS (
  SELECT
    c.*,
    (current_date - c.effective_date) AS days_since_effective
  FROM current_members c
  LEFT JOIN signups s
    ON lower(trim(c.full_name)) = s.member_name
   AND c.signup_match_group = s.signup_match_group
  WHERE s.member_name IS NULL
    AND c.effective_date IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      c.effective_date > current_date
      OR c.effective_date::timestamp <= now() - interval '1 hour'
    )
), settings AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END), 'http://n8n:5678') AS n8n_base_url
  FROM public.global_settings
)
SELECT
  full_name AS "Member",
  "Membership",
  category AS "Membership Category",
  "Email address",
  "Venue ID",
  "British Tennis Number",
  effective_date AS "Effective Date",
  days_since_effective AS "Days Since Effective",
  raw_member_id,
  settings.n8n_base_url
FROM missing
CROSS JOIN settings
ORDER BY effective_date, full_name;

card.description: Writable admin view of public.global_settings. Open the question to edit values.
card.name: Global Settings

card.description: Latest reconcile outcome counts for raw_members and raw_contacts.
card.name: Latest Raw Match Outcomes

stages.native: WITH latest AS ( SELECT max(run_at) AS run_at FROM public.raw_reconcile_match_audit ) SELECT a.raw_table, a.outcome, count(*)::int AS row_count FROM public.raw_reconcile_match_audit a JOIN latest l ON a.run_at = l.run_at GROUP BY a.raw_table, a.outcome ORDER BY a.raw_table, a.outcome;

select
    source_season as "Season",
    max(captured_at) as "Captured At",
    max(case when membership = 'Total' then member_count end) as "Total Members",
    count(*) filter (where membership <> 'Total') as "Membership Types"
from public.membership_history_snapshots
group by source_season
order by source_season desc;

card.description: Archive-run level summary for historical raw import tables.
card.name: Historical Archive Runs

stages.native:
with runs as (
    select
        'Contacts'::text as source,
        date_trunc('day', archived_at) as archived_day,
        snapshot_year,
        snapshot_source,
        count(*)::bigint as archived_rows
    from public.raw_contacts_historical
    group by 1, 2, 3, 4
    union all
    select
        'Members'::text as source,
        date_trunc('day', archived_at) as archived_day,
        snapshot_year,
        snapshot_source,
        count(*)::bigint as archived_rows
    from public.raw_members_historical
    group by 1, 2, 3, 4
)
select
    source as "Source",
    archived_day as "Archived Day",
    snapshot_year as "Snapshot Year",
    snapshot_source as "Snapshot Source",
    archived_rows as "Archived Rows"
from runs
order by "Archived Day" desc, "Source", "Snapshot Year" desc;

card.description: Membership counts from the most recent capture in public.membership_history_snapshots.
card.name: Latest Membership Snapshot Breakdown

stages.native:
with latest as (
    select max(captured_at) as captured_at
    from public.membership_history_snapshots
)
select
    source_season as "Season",
    membership as "Membership",
    member_count as "Members",
    captured_at as "Captured At"
from public.membership_history_snapshots
where captured_at = (select captured_at from latest)
order by case when membership = 'Total' then 0 else 1 end, membership;

card.description: Current raw snapshot state alongside historical archive coverage for members and contacts.
card.name: Historical Import Snapshot State

stages.native:
with archive_rollup as (
    select
        'raw_members'::text as table_name,
        count(*)::bigint as archived_rows,
        min(archived_at) as first_archived_at,
        max(archived_at) as last_archived_at,
        string_agg(distinct snapshot_source, ', ' order by snapshot_source) as snapshot_sources
    from public.raw_members_historical
    union all
    select
        'raw_contacts'::text as table_name,
        count(*)::bigint as archived_rows,
        min(archived_at) as first_archived_at,
        max(archived_at) as last_archived_at,
        string_agg(distinct snapshot_source, ', ' order by snapshot_source) as snapshot_sources
    from public.raw_contacts_historical
)
select
    case rss.table_name
        when 'raw_members' then 'Members'
        when 'raw_contacts' then 'Contacts'
        else rss.table_name
    end as "Source",
    rss.current_snapshot_year as "Current Snapshot Year",
    coalesce(ar.archived_rows, 0) as "Archived Rows",
    ar.first_archived_at as "First Archived At",
    coalesce(ar.last_archived_at, rss.updated_at) as "Last Archived / Updated",
    ar.snapshot_sources as "Snapshot Sources"
from public.raw_snapshot_state rss
left join archive_rollup ar on ar.table_name = rss.table_name
where rss.table_name in ('raw_members', 'raw_contacts')
order by "Source";

card.description: Total rows currently stored in public.raw_contacts_historical.
card.name: Historical Contacts Archived Rows

stages.native: select count(*) as archived_contact_rows from public.raw_contacts_historical;

card.description: Total rows currently stored in public.raw_members_historical.
card.name: Historical Members Archived Rows

stages.native: select count(*) as archived_member_rows from public.raw_members_historical;

card.description: Year-over-year member signups by week: Mar 2025–Feb 2026 vs Mar 2026–Feb 2027, with cumulative totals
card.name: Member Signups by date - YoY Comparison (Weekly)

stages.native:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN CURRENT_DATE < DATE '2026-03-01' THEN 0
    WHEN CURRENT_DATE >= DATE '2027-03-01' THEN 53
    ELSE FLOOR((CURRENT_DATE - DATE '2026-03-01') / 7.0)::int + 1
  END AS current_week_2026_27
),
weekly AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN signup_date::date >= DATE '2025-03-01' AND signup_date::date < DATE '2026-03-01' THEN '2025-26'
      WHEN signup_date::date >= DATE '2026-03-01' AND signup_date::date < DATE '2027-03-01' THEN '2026-27'
    END AS period,
    CASE
      WHEN signup_date::date >= DATE '2025-03-01' AND signup_date::date < DATE '2026-03-01'
        THEN FLOOR((signup_date::date - DATE '2025-03-01') / 7.0)::int + 1
      WHEN signup_date::date >= DATE '2026-03-01' AND signup_date::date < DATE '2027-03-01'
        THEN FLOOR((signup_date::date - DATE '2026-03-01') / 7.0)::int + 1
    END AS week_no,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM member_signups
  WHERE (signup_date::date >= DATE '2025-03-01' AND signup_date::date < DATE '2026-03-01')
     OR (signup_date::date >= DATE '2026-03-01' AND signup_date::date < DATE '2027-03-01')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
weeks AS (
  SELECT generate_series(1, 53) AS week_no
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT
    weeks.week_no,
    'Week ' || weeks.week_no AS week_label,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN period = '2025-26' THEN cnt END), 0) AS "Signups 2025-26",
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN period = '2026-27' THEN cnt END), 0) AS "Signups 2026-27"
  FROM weeks
  LEFT JOIN weekly USING (week_no)
  GROUP BY weeks.week_no
),
with_cumulative AS (
  SELECT
    week_no,
    week_label,
    "Signups 2025-26",
    "Signups 2026-27",
    SUM("Signups 2025-26") OVER (ORDER BY week_no) AS "Cumulative 2025-26",
    CASE
      WHEN week_no <= current_week_2026_27
      THEN SUM("Signups 2026-27") OVER (ORDER BY week_no)
    END AS "Cumulative 2026-27"
  FROM pivoted
  CROSS JOIN params
)
SELECT
  week_no AS "Week",
  week_label AS "Week Label",
  "Signups 2025-26",
  "Signups 2026-27",
  "Cumulative 2025-26",
  "Cumulative 2026-27"
FROM with_cumulative
ORDER BY week_no

card.description: Active n8n GET webhooks that return HTML forms, including inferred form parameter names.
card.name: n8n HTML Form Webhooks

stages.native:
with settings as (
  select max(case when key = 'n8n_base_url' then value end) as n8n_base_url
  from public.global_settings
), active_wf as (
  select id, name, nodes::jsonb as nodes
  from n8n.workflow_entity
  where active and not coalesce("isArchived", false)
), html_form_workflows as (
  select aw.id, aw.name, aw.nodes
  from active_wf aw
  where exists (
    select 1
    from jsonb_array_elements(aw.nodes) node
    where node->>'type' = 'n8n-nodes-base.respondToWebhook'
      and node::text ilike '%text/html%'
  )
    and aw.nodes::text ilike '%<form%'
), webhook_rows as (
  select aw.id as workflow_id,
         aw.name as workflow_name,
         we.method,
         we."webhookPath" as webhook_path,
         aw.nodes
  from html_form_workflows aw
  join n8n.webhook_entity we
    on we."workflowId" = aw.id
  where we.method = 'GET'
), fields as (
  select wr.workflow_id,
         string_agg(distinct f.field_name, ', ' order by f.field_name) as form_fields
  from webhook_rows wr
  left join lateral (
    select m[1] as field_name
    from regexp_matches(wr.nodes::text, $$name=\\\"([^\\\"]+)\\\"$$, 'g') m
    where m[1] not in ('submit')
  ) f on true
  group by wr.workflow_id
)
select wr.workflow_name as "Name",
       (select n8n_base_url from settings) || '/webhook/' || wr.webhook_path as "Webhook URL",
       wr.method as "Method",
       wr.webhook_path as "Path",
       coalesce(fields.form_fields, '') as "Parameters"
from webhook_rows wr
left join fields on fields.workflow_id = wr.workflow_id
order by wr.workflow_name;
